name: Airbyte
long_description:
Airbyte Agents is the context layer your AI agents query before they act. Features the Context Store, which unifies entities across Salesforce, Stripe, Zendesk and more. Use it from the UI, your LLM via MCP, or our SDK. 40% fewer tool calls, up to 80% fewer tokens.

Airbyte Data Replication is the leading open data movement platform that empowers data teams in the AI era by transforming raw data into actionable intelligence. 

https://github.com/airbytehq/
one_liner: Context layer for production-grade AI agents
